/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/test_logging_interface.dir/test/test_logging_interface.cpp.o -o test_logging_interface  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/build/rcl_logging_spdlog:/root/ros2_ws/install/rcpputils/lib:/root/ros2_ws/install/rcl_logging_interface/lib:/opt/ros/humble/lib gmock/libgmock_main.a gmock/libgmock.a librcl_logging_spdlog.so /root/ros2_ws/install/rcpputils/lib/librcpputils.so -pthread /root/ros2_ws/install/rcl_logging_interface/lib/librcl_logging_interface.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
